subcodes.first_line: O thou who diffuseth the fragrances of truth! Stand thou firm in the Cause of God, even as a tree firmly rooted, with mighty trunk and spreading branches [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من نشر نفحات الحق استقم علی امر الله کشجره ثابته الاصل غلیظه الدوحه منشعبه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Mosaic imagery, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @knowledge; recognition of God
